The San José City Council voted on September 1, 2020 to begin charging commercial developers fees to fund affordable housing. The Commercial Linkage Fee is a one-time impact fee that applies to new and existing Non-Residential Projects in San José that either add gross floor area or change the existing building use. The San José City Council voted on December 11, 2018 to pursue a nexus and a feasibility study on a potential commercial linkage fee in San José. | Industrial/Research and Development (≥100,000 sq.ft.) | $3.58 - When paid in full prior to the Building Permit issuance, a 20% reducti [normalized=3.58 ; unit=usd_per_square_foot]
